hotel_name: Căn hộ khách sạn 5 sao À LaCarte Hạ Long (5-Star Hotel Apartment À LaCarte Ha Long)

reviews.title: Alright
reviews.text: Alright
reviews.response: Hello Reiss, you booked a sea-view apartment, and we arranged the best view for you. You arrived at 12 PM, while our check-in time is 2 PM. We had to clean up quickly to accommodate your early check-in without any extra charge. On check-out day, I messaged you to leave your key card in the room, but you took it downstairs, causing you to wait a little longer for our staff to come and collect it. Is the long wait the reason you gave our accommodation a low rating? I don't understand why you gave us 3 stars when we provided you with the best possible experience.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: We are currently staying at 5?stars apartments in ha longbay and we are disappointed. Even though the rooms are stunning, it was never mentioned that we have to pay extra for amenities, such as toilet paper, bin bags…we have room for three and one of the mattraces is hard as a stone, nobody can sleep on it. What can we do?There is no room cleaning service, it is an apartment, not a hotel, ok understandable. The host lady that met us was cold and rude and belittled and laughed at me, when I asked how the lift worked. She also doesn’t speak good english and has no info about the hotel/ building amenities. she just wanted to be done with us.You must pay for swimming pools and gym, this is like airb&b really. The cloth to clean the dishes is disgustingly old and dirty so is the bath matt and there are stains on curtains. Absolutely nothing has been explained to us or made us feel welcomed. Very alarming first night.
reviews.response: Xin chào Danny, trước hết chúng tôi xin lỗi về những dịch vụ chưa được như bạn mong đợi. Tuy nhiên tối muốn giải thích để bạn hiểu rõ hơn về nhưng vấn đề sau: Ngay trong tên chỗ nghỉ của chúng tôi cũng là "Căn hộ" trong phần mô tả và quy định có ghi rõ giá phòng chưa bao gồm các dịch vụ ăn sáng, bể bơi, gym, spa. Ngoài ra chúng tôi cũng setup đầy đủ các đồ dùng trong phòng khi bạn nhận phòng vào ngày đầu tiên, tất cả đều miễn phí, chúng tôi không thu phí túi rác hay giấy vệ sinh của bạn.Bạn đặt phòng vào dịp lễ 30/4 ngày hôm đó rất đông đúc, có lẽ vậy mà nhân viên đã hơi cáu kỉnh và vội vàng, mong bạn thông cảm về điều đó.

reviews.title: Terrible experience
reviews.text:
- Firstly, the booking company informed me that the refrigerator in the room was broken on the morning of my check-in (too late notice). This wouldn't have been a big deal if, later during a conflict with the manager, he said that he had already dealt with booking about the refrigerator, and since I rented the place, I accepted it, so I shouldn’t complain. 
- When I checked in: the bed sheets, floor, and pillows were full of sand. 
- The room had a washing machine, but it was unusable; I was told that the owner did not allow its use, and the TV in the bedroom was also locked by the owner, preventing access to the internet. 
- The worst part was at checkout: my family cooked and cleaned very thoroughly, washing all the dishes and taking out all the trash. However, when checking out, the manager ( ***) waited for us to leave the key and then went downstairs (couldn't go back up) before he came to check. 
After that, he messaged me that the house smelled too much like seafood, and if it wasn’t cleaned up completely, they would charge it against my deposit. When I called to talk, he said: the owner hadn’t agreed to cooking and had allowed my family to cook, so there shouldn’t be any smell left ??? In the booking message, I clearly had evidence that cooking was allowed and cleaning was done, with no mention of any food smell. My family went back to the lobby to ask him to come down to discuss, but he delayed for about 20 minutes and then said that he would work with booking again and transfer the deposit back to me. 

In summary: even though I didn’t lose anything additional, this was an extremely poor customer service experience. Everything he argued with me was that it was because of booking, he had clarified with booking, so I should deal with them. Is customer service really that easy? A location manager should know how to handle situations and review their working methods, not just shift blame to booking, making the customer feel extremely uncomfortable. My family is generally easy-going, so I overlooked all the initial mistakes by the rental side and didn’t pay attention, but because of the terrible experience at checkout, I decided to bring everything up. That’s it (there's more, but I’m lazy and don't want to think back to those poor experiences, so I'll let it go).
reviews.response: Em chào anh, trước hết bên em xin lỗi vì những trải nghiệm chưa tốt của nhà mình. Thứ nhất, việc tủ lạnh hỏng là việc phát sinh vào buổi sáng khi khách out bên e mới biết nên đã thông báo với anh luôn, và anh cũng không phản hồi về việc đó. Thứ hai, Căn hộ có bếp và đồ nầu cơ bản tuy nhiên không nấu lẩu và ăn hải sản (cái này đã có trong nội quy bên em). Và sau khi khách sử dụng bếp xong phải rửa bát+nồi vì giá phòng chưa bao gồm phí dọn dẹp bếp ạ. Có thể là cách cư xử của anh quản gia chưa được khéo léo tuy nhiên nhà mình cũng không tuân thủ quy định của bên em.

reviews.title: Underwhelming and Inconvenient
reviews.text:
When booking Ala Carte, be aware there are two buildings. Don’t book the residence. It’s basically privately owned condos that are rented out. There were almost no dishes in the “kitchen” so we couldn’t have eaten in if we wanted to. The washer/dryer mostly functioned as a washer. This was a big reason we booked this specific place, it was mid point on our trip and needed to do laundry. It only functioned as a washer. No matter how long you set the dryer for, it stopped after 9 minutes. I sat and watched the timer as it would skip minutes and then stop at the 9 minute mark even if there was 30 left on the timer. It was faster to hang the clothes in the bathroom. There were ants. Not sure how ants can find you on the 32nd floor, but there they were. The sofa was stained when we got there so we messaged the check in host to make sure they didn’t deduct money from our 1M VND deposit. The view is nice, but faces the wrong way to see any of the good sites in the bay. We were given one key, and since you need that to control the elevator and power to the room, we found one of us could not leave for the store or the spa without leaving the other in the dark. We had to ask for a second key and additional towels. And there are no beach towels. 

A big disappointment was the pool. I missed on the posting that it is not included with the room. In the bright side, it’s only $5 to use and was not crowded because it was pay for use. 

The location was just okay. The whole area is being built up so there was very little to do and not many dining options. In about a year, this will be much better, after all the construction is over and the store fronts are filled. Fortunately it was pretty cheap to take a Grab to Bai Chay where there were lots of options. 

When we were getting ready to check out we received a message asking us to leave a review, only if it was positive and to let them know privately any issues we had. How can you trust the reviews then?  The girl came to inspect the room at check out. The first thing she did was go to the bed, whip back the covers on my side, point to a small stain and ask “what is this?”  That was the only thing she inspected and went straight for it. This makes me think they put it there on purpose to take part of your deposit. When I told her it was already there, and showed her the communication about the stained sofa, she got a wet paper towel and tried to scrub the sheet. When it did not come out, showing it was a preexisting stain, she gave us our money and stopped the inspection. It was very awkward and felt fairly invasive.

reviews.title: Great facilities … poor service
reviews.text:
This hotel has absolutely nothing nearby apart from a little super mart … 
staff were not friendly and really could not be bothered even smiling 
Restaurant food was so cheap but so poor of taste  and was just not rateable at all.
reviews.response: Hi Megan, we are a self-operated apartment in a hotel, so the hotel staff will not be able to assist you, we will have a private butler to welcome you. However you are a really bad customer, you left with a very messy room, you broke one of our cups and said nothing. Also you lost your elevator card.

reviews.title: Reference
reviews.text:
I rented an apartment 
- a relatively new hotel, beautiful swimming pool on the 40th floor, great children's play area, nice view, but not very convenient for playing, the beach is not clean
- the rented room has a washing machine

- the floor is dirty, the wifi and TV have no signal, reported to management to fix it but they didn't. One bathroom has no hot water, using a jug for shower.
- everyone should pay attention to check the sink in the kitchen, we rented for one day, went out to play, didn't cook or anything, but when checking out, management reported that something was clogged, it was a very bad experience.
reviews.response: Em cám ơn chị, bên em sẽ khắc phục những thiếu sót ạ.

reviews.title: Room A1101 bad experiences
reviews.text:
I booked a room not managed by the hotel but by an external manager. When I arrived, there was no concierge at the check-in time. When I called the concierge, they hesitantly said to wait. I had to wait a long time before someone came to take me to my room.

Upon reaching the room, the sofa had an unpleasant smell. The shower gel and shampoo were stored in a 5-liter container under the kitchen cabinet.

When it was checkout time, I called the person who had taken me to my room the previous day to arrange the checkout, but I had to wait over an hour for someone else to come check the room (it was a different person). At check-in, I was asked for a deposit of 1 million VND; during checkout, I was not refunded immediately but was told to contact the concierge to receive the money back. When I reached out, I was told to wait again. I continued to wait for 3 hours and 30 minutes but still hadn't received the refund. When I messaged, I was told to wait again because they were busy cleaning rooms. It’s truly laughable. A 5-star apartment with 0-star service for room A1101. A terrible experience.

If booking a room here, make sure to book a room that is managed by the hotel to experience good service. I had been here before when booking under the hotel's management, and there were no issues at all.
reviews.response: Em chào chị, trước hết bên e xin lỗi vì những trải nghiệm chưa tốt của gia đình mình ạ. Bên em có nhắn qua app nhưng k thấy nhà mình phản hồi lại số điện thoại để liên hệ xem mấy giờ nhà mình đến nên hơi bị động khi đón nhà mình. Thời gian checkout các bạn cũng khá bận vì out phòng và dọn dẹp nên có chậm chễ trong việc hoàn cọc tài sản, mong nhà mình thông cảm ạ.

reviews.title: Phòng đẹp - dịch vụ bình thường
reviews.text: Tòa có 8 thang máy nhưng setup khóa lại, chỉ tập trung đi được 1-2 thang, phải chờ rất lâu. Dịch vụ của bên chủ đầu tư nên ko chuyên nghiệp như  của khách sạn, mình bị check in muộn 1 tiếng, chờ đến 3h chiều mới được nhận phòng, lúc nhận phòng người nọ gọi người kia nhờ dẫn khách hộ, phải chờ lâu. Dù được hỗ trợ check out muộn để bù lại nhưng dịch vụ như vậy vẫn vất vả cho người già và trẻ nhỏ nhà mình. Phòng đẹp, sạch sẽ. Bãi biển nhiều vỏ ốc và nhiều phù sa.
reviews.response: Dạ, e cám ơn chị ạ, bên e sẽ khắc phục những thiếu sót ạ, vì nhà mình đặt phòng vào đúng dịp lễ khác đông nên thang máy chờ hơi lâu ạ. Chúc nhà mình có chuyến đi vui vẻ ạ ^^

reviews.title: Family summer experience

To swim, you have to buy a ticket, and the apartment complex does not offer breakfast; you have to buy a separate ticket for that as well.

reviews.title: Lovely Modern Hotel/Apartment
reviews.text:
It's a highrise looking down to the sandy Sora Bay beach and the view of HaLong Bay in the distance.
The building was built in 2023 and is virtually new with all the modern western technologies.  Our room was no different - it was large, well layout and clean with all the typical amenities, washer and modern appliances.  There were 2 infinity pools on the roof top. You can use the lounge chairs and enjoy the view; however, to use the pool it depends on how you booked your room otherwise there is a fee, similarly with breakfast.
There are 2 types of booking: as a hotel guest or a building resident. As a hotel guest, the above mentioned are included.
All said, I most definitely recommend this hotel for its services, location and  its price. Best

reviews.title: Vietnam highlight
reviews.text:
The condo itself was immaculately clean and beautifully decorated in a modern, coastal style. The kitchen was well-equipped, making it easy to prepare meals, and the living area was comfortable and inviting. Bedrooms were cozy, and we slept wonderfully to the sound of the ocean.
Location-wise, it couldn't be better. We had direct access to the beach, which was clean and not too crowded. It felt very private and serene. There were also several fantastic restaurants and shops within a short walk or drive, offering plenty of options for dining and entertainment.
If you're looking for a relaxing getaway with unbeatable ocean views and direct beach access, look no further. We're already planning our return! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Phòng rất tuyệt vời
reviews.text:
- Nhân viên khi được hỏi và nhờ, họ đã hỗ trợ tôi rất nhiệt tình, giúp cho tôi rất nhiều vì thế chuyến ghé thăm à la carte rất suôn sẻ và thuận lợi.
- Khi vào phòng thì mới thấy sự tiện nghi và đầy đủ, từ lối vào có máy giặt sấy, khu bếp với tủ lạnh lò vi sóng tủ đựng đồ đầy đủ, ti vi, giường, sofa đều rất gọn gàng sạch sẽ, view của phòng thực sự làm chúng tôi bất ngờ. Ngay cả phòng tắm cũng được phân khu rất rõ và đồ đạc được chuẩn bị khá kĩ càng, còn có cả máy sấy. Khá kĩ càng bởi chưa có lược chải tóc nhưng mà chúng tôi có mang theo lược nên không ảnh hưởng quá nhiều.
- Việc dùng thẻ phòng và hệ thống thang máy hiện đại giúp cho sự di chuyển của chúng tôi rất thoải mái. Hơi tiếc một chút vì chưa kịp trải nghiệm hết các tiện ích của toà nhà nhưng trải nghiệm của chúng tôi tại à la carte thấy rất tuyệt vời.

reviews.title: Evaluation
reviews.text:
I just had a vacation at A La Carte Ha Long and I am really satisfied with my experience here.

✅ The rooms are clean, modern, and spacious. The minimalist yet sophisticated design is fully equipped with amenities from kitchen, washing machine to workspace and a balcony with a sea view. From my room, I can see Ha Long Bay, the view is super chill – especially at sunset!

✅ Professional and friendly service. The staff always smile and assist quickly and enthusiastically, from the front desk to the housekeeping team. I am particularly impressed with the attention to detail in every small aspect.

✅ Top-notch amenities: The infinity pool on the top floor is a highlight not to be missed. There is also a gym, a rich buffet breakfast restaurant, and a café space that is extremely relaxing.

✅ Convenient location: The hotel is located right in the center of Ha Long Marina, close to Sun World, CGV, and many good restaurants – making it very convenient for moving around and having fun.

💯 Overall, I rate this as a worthwhile choice, worth experiencing for both relaxation and work. If you are looking for a place that is both luxurious and well-equipped, close to the beach in Ha Long – A La Carte is a great suggestion!

Phòng này do 1 chủ cá nhân quản lý, chỉ có duy nhất 1 thẻ phòng nên khá bất tiện khi 1 người xuống mua đồ lại không có thẻ để lên phòng. Không đc để xe dưới hầm như mọi lần trước đã đặt, không có dịch vụ dọn phòng và thay khăn tắm, nói chung là khá thất vọng về dịch vụ lần này.
reviews.response: Cám ơn chị đã hài lòng về dịch vụ Căn hộ bên em ạ. Quỹ phòng bên em là căn hộ và thẻ thang tích hợp với ổ điện nên chỉ có thể cung cấp 1 thẻ, khi khách ra khỏi phòng cần phải rút thẻ để tắt điện và điều hoà ạ. Ngoài ra mỗi phòng đã setup đủ khăn tắm để nhà mình có thể sử dụng đủ trong thời gian lưu trú ạ.

reviews.title: Không recommend
reviews.text: Khách sạn 5* nhưng không đạt tiêu chuẩn 5*. Với giá tiền này book đại 1 phòng ở HL thì chất lượng và dịch vụ nhận lại đều ok hơn. Do ks quá đông hay như nào mà mình không được checkin tại quầy mà có người như là chủ hay sao ấy xuống đưa thẻ phòng tại sảnh. Bên này cũng không nhận hành lý khách gửi. Amenities trong phòng không đầy đủ, chỉ có 2 chiếc khăn tắm, không có sữa tắm. Chăn không có ruột. Nói chung sẽ không quay lại hoặc mn thêm tiền book bên khách sạn của họ thì oke hơn.
reviews.response: Em cám ơn chị đã để lại phản hồi ạ. Phòng bên em là căn hộ nên sẽ có quản gia đón riêng ạ. Có nhiều phòng bên em mới lấy về vận hành nên đồ setup còn thiếu, nếu nhà mình báo với quản gia sẽ bổ sung luôn đó ạ. Còn những thiếu sót bên em sẽ khắc phục ạ.
